references.hebrew: כׇּל־הַמִּשְׁכָּ֗ב אֲשֶׁ֨ר יִשְׁכַּ֥ב עָלָ֛יו הַזָּ֖ב יִטְמָ֑א וְכׇֽל־הַכְּלִ֛י אֲשֶׁר־יֵשֵׁ֥ב עָלָ֖יו יִטְמָֽא׃
references.english: Any bedding on which the one with the discharge lies shall be impure, and every object on which he sits shall be impure.

references.hebrew: וְהַיֹּשֵׁב֙ עַֽל־הַכְּלִ֔י אֲשֶׁר־יֵשֵׁ֥ב עָלָ֖יו הַזָּ֑ב יְכַבֵּ֧ס בְּגָדָ֛יו וְרָחַ֥ץ בַּמַּ֖יִם וְטָמֵ֥א עַד־הָעָֽרֶב׃
references.english: Whoever sits on an object on which the one with the discharge has sat shall wash their clothes, bathe in water, and remain impure until evening.

commentary_links.hebrew: וְכׇ֨ל־הַנֹּגֵ֔עַ בְּכׇל־כְּלִ֖י אֲשֶׁר־תֵּשֵׁ֣ב עָלָ֑יו יְכַבֵּ֧ס בְּגָדָ֛יו וְרָחַ֥ץ בַּמַּ֖יִם וְטָמֵ֥א עַד־הָעָֽרֶב׃
commentary_links.english: and anyone who touches any object on which she has sat shall wash their clothes, bathe in water, and remain impure until evening.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: כלי אשר ישב עליו וגו יכול א כפה סאה
